table.empty.title: Nothing here yet
table.empty.description: Records will appear here once you add them.
table.error.title: Failed to load
table.error.description: Something went wrong. Please try again.
confirm.delete.title: Delete this record?
confirm.delete.description: This action cannot be undone. The record will be permanently deleted.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.style_desc: Surface material for the whole admin.
settings.appearance.bg_desc: Pick a preset per theme, or upload your own image.
uikit.title: UI Kit — living reference
uikit.subtitle: Showcase of archetypes and components. New screens are copied from here, not invented.
uikit.field.title: Title
uikit.field.title.help: Shown in lists and as the page heading.
uikit.widget.sizes: Widget size = content tier: sm · md · lg · xl
media.title: Media library
media.presets.title: Image presets
media.presets.hint: Sizes are declared by modules and the active theme; your overrides apply on save.
media.presets.retina_hint: A second @2x copy for dense screens; skipped when the original is too small.
media.presets.confirm_description: Variants will be regenerated in the background — the site won't slow down. You'll get a notification when it finishes.
uikit.section.pickers: Pickers: date, color, multi-select, reference, media
login.title: Sign in to the admin panel
ai.title: AI assistant
ai.hint: Describe a task in plain words — the assistant completes it through permitted tools strictly within your rights.
ai.attachLimit: Up to 10 files can be attached
ai.disclaimer: Actions run strictly within your permissions; destructive ones always require confirmation.
notifications.title: Notifications
error.404.title: Page not found
error.404.description: This address does not exist in the admin panel. The link may be outdated or the record was deleted.
error.500.title: Something went wrong
error.500.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page — if that does not help, we are already on it.
error.403.title: No access
error.403.description: Your role has no permission for this section. Contact an administrator if you need access.
uikit.switchrow.title: Switch row
uikit.switchrow.a_hint: Send a message on every new submission.
uikit.switchrow.b_hint: Require a one-time code at sign-in.
login.throttled: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
login.mfa_hint: Enter the code from your authenticator app or a one-time recovery code.
forgot.title: Password recovery
forgot.hint: Enter your email — if the account exists, we will send a password reset link.
forgot.sent: If that account exists, an email with the link is on its way. Check your inbox.
reset.title: New password
reset.done: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
reset.invalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
relogin.title: Session expired
relogin.description: Sign in again to continue. Your unsaved changes are safe.
relogin.switch_confirm: Go to the sign-in page? Unsaved changes will be lost.
locale_switcher.label: Content language
palette.title: Quick navigation
activity.no_changes: This entry contains no field changes
activity.empty_hint: Actions will appear here as you work in the admin
banner.maintenance_read_only: Maintenance: the public site is read-only
banner.maintenance_full: The site is down for maintenance — visitors see a stub page
dashboard.empty: You don't have access to any sections yet — ask an administrator
dashboard.period.label: Period
dashboard.customize.editing_role: You are customizing the dashboard of the role “{role}”
dashboard.customize.reset_title: Reset the layout of the role “{role}”?
dashboard.customize.reset_description: The order, sizes and visibility of widgets and quick actions will return to the defaults. Other roles are not affected.
dashboard.customize.dirty_description: Switching the role will discard your layout edits.
dashboard.action.clear_cache_confirm_des: Pages will be rebuilt on the next requests — the site may respond slower for a short while.
activity.widget.title: Recent activity
placeholder.title: Screen under construction
common.request_failed: The request failed. Please try again.
uikit.savebar.hint: Start typing — the SaveBar appears at the bottom
settings.code.warning: This code is injected unchecked into every page of the site. Only paste code you trust.
settings.code.no_visible_diff: Changes are in blank lines only
settings.dirty.title: You have unsaved changes
settings.dirty.description: Switching tabs will discard your changes.
settings.maintenance.desc_off: Normal mode: the site is fully available to visitors.
settings.maintenance.desc_read_only: Maintenance mode: visitors can read the site, but forms, cart and sign-in are disabled.
settings.maintenance.desc_full: Site closed: visitors see a 503 stub page. The admin stays available.
settings.help.site_url: The canonical public address — used in emails, sitemap and OG markup.
settings.help.og_image: Used when sharing pages that have no OG image of their own.
settings.help.site.maintenance_mode: While the mode is not "normal", a warning banner is shown in the admin topbar.
settings.help.media.driver: Where new uploads are stored. Choosing S3 reveals the connection fields below.
settings.help.media.max_original_width: Wider uploads are downscaled to this width.
settings.help.privacy.consent_enabled: Show the cookie consent banner to visitors (enable for GDPR jurisdictions).
settings.help.privacy.consent_categories: JSON list of categories with a key and a required flag; required ones can't be declined.
settings.help.privacy.consent_texts: Overrides the shipped banner texts per locale; empty uses the defaults.
settings.help.debug.enabled: SQL and timing panel for users with the settings permission.
settings.help.debug.slow_query_ms: Queries slower than this are highlighted in the Debug Bar.
settings.help.debug.sentry_dsn: Server errors will be sent to your Sentry project.
activity.hint: Who changed what in the admin
settings.section.site.images_hint: Logo, favicon and social sharing image
users.hint: Admin panel accounts and their access.
users.col.name: Name
users.empty_hint: Try changing the filters or the search query.
users.self_locked: You can't change this for yourself.
users.field.name: Name
users.password.title: New password for {name}
users.password.hint: The user will be signed out on all devices.
users.impersonate.title: Log in as {name}?
users.impersonate.description: Every action will be recorded in the activity log under your name.
users.deactivate.title: Deactivate {name}?
users.deactivate.description: They won't be able to sign in; their data and authorship are kept.
users.deactivate.last_admin_hint: The last active administrator can't be deactivated
users.mfa_reset.hint: The user has 2FA enabled. Reset it if the device is lost — they can sign in with just the password and set 2FA up again.
users.mfa_reset.title: Reset 2FA for {name}?
users.mfa_reset.description: The secret and recovery codes will be deleted. The action is recorded in the activity log.
users.error.email_taken: This email is already in use.
users.error.self_locked: You can't change this for yourself.
users.error.last_admin: This is the last active administrator.
roles.add_hint: Create a new role and optionally copy permissions from an existing one.
roles.delete_has_users: First move {count} users to another role.
roles.field.label: Name
roles.error.invalid_slug: Latin letters, digits and underscores only.
roles.error.key_taken: This key is already in use.
profile.field.name: Name
profile.password.title: Change password
profile.password.hint: Other sessions will be signed out.
mfa.title: Security
mfa.hint: Two-factor authentication with a one-time code from an authenticator app.
mfa.scan_title: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
mfa.scan_hint: Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy or any TOTP app. No camera? Enter the secret manually.
mfa.codes_hint: Save these codes in a safe place — they are shown only once. Each code signs you in once if you lose the device.
mfa.disable_hint: Enter a fresh code from the app or a recovery code to confirm.
mfa.enroll_required_hint: Your role requires 2FA. Set it up to continue working in the admin panel.
help.subtitle: How to use the panel — organized by menu sections
help.fallbackNote: This article is shown in its original language — the translation is not ready yet.
help.unavailableHint: The module may be disabled or the page was moved. Pick an article from the list on the left.
editor.dirty.title: Unsaved changes
editor.dirty.description: This page has unsaved changes. Leave without saving?
ai.example.pages: Create a draft of the “Promotions” page
ai.example.forms: How many form submissions this week?
ai.example.contacts: Make a plan: change the phone number in contacts
ai.plan.title: Action plan
ai.confirm.title: Confirmation required
ai.toolConfirm.description: The {tool} tool will run on your behalf. This action is irreversible.
ai.settings.test_fail: Connection failed — check the key and model
ai.spend.title: AI spend by day
settings.section.ai.provider_hint: LLM provider, model and access key
settings.section.ai.limits_hint: Cost, reply length and chat retention
settings.section.ai.categories_hint: Tool categories available to the agent
settings.section.ai.mcp_hint: External agents' access to site tools
settings.help.ai.provider: The provider must support tool use.
settings.help.ai.model: Provider model id; a custom one can be entered.
settings.help.ai.base_url: Only for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint: vLLM, Ollama, OpenRouter, Azure.
settings.help.ai.daily_cost_cap_minor: In cents ($1 = 100). 0 — forbidden; empty — system default 500.
settings.help.ai.max_output_tokens: Maximum length of a single model reply.
settings.help.ai.allowed_categories.dest: Off — destructive tools are hidden for everyone.
settings.help.ai.mcp_enabled: External agents (e.g. Claude Code) connect to /api/mcp with personal tokens and act strictly with the token owner's rights.
settings.help.ai.log_triage_enabled: Daily collection of error/critical log entries with AI summaries of causes.
settings.help.ai.findings_retention_days: New and acknowledged findings are never purged.
ai.findings.title: Log findings
ai.findings.hint: Nightly triage: error/critical entries grouped by cause
ai.findings.note_hint: Commit or fix version — visible to teammates and the external agent.
ai.findings.note_placeholder: e.g. fix in v1.5.1 / commit abc123
settings.help.site_logo: Main logo in the site header
settings.help.site_logo_dark: For dark backgrounds / dark theme. Empty — the main logo is used
settings.help.site_logo_footer: Logo in the site footer (often a different color or style)
settings.help.site_logo_footer_dark: Footer logo for dark theme. Empty — the footer logo is used
privacy.panel.title: Cookie consent
privacy.panel.hint: Configure the consent banner shown to visitors
privacy.categories.title: Cookie categories
privacy.categories.hint: Cookie groups visitors can toggle on/off. “necessary” is always required.
privacy.texts.title: Banner texts
privacy.texts.hint: Texts per language. An empty field uses the default text.
privacy.text.description_placeholder: Briefly: why cookies are used and a link to the policy
media.regen.title: Regenerate variants
media.regen.hint: Variant regeneration status. Start it from a preset group below.
settings.help.media.image_format: Format of generated variants. WebP is smaller, but some prefer JPG for compatibility.
media.regen.idle: Not running. Press “Regenerate” on a preset group.
media.regen.confirm_body: Variants of {count} presets in group “{group}” will be rebuilt. Runs in the background — the site is not slowed.
settings.help.content.per_page: How many records (posts, products) to show per page on public listings — blog, catalog, feeds.
settings.help.media.s3.endpoint: Address of the S3-compatible storage (e.g. https://s3.amazonaws.com or your own).
settings.help.media.s3.public_url: Direct domain/CDN for serving files. Empty — files are served via a redirect (slower).
shop.orders.hint: All store orders with payment and fulfillment status.
shop.orders.empty_hint: Orders will appear here once customers check out.
shop.orders.detail.title: Order
shop.orders.detail.heading: Order {number}
shop.orders.detail.confirm.description: This action changes the order status and notifies the customer in a real store.
shop.products.hint: Catalog items with price, stock and status.
shop.products.col.name: Product
shop.products.empty_hint: Add your first product to get started.
shop.products.field.name: Name
shop.customers.hint: Customers with orders, lifetime value and status.
shop.customers.impersonate_demo: Impersonation is a demo action in this template.
shop.customers.col.name: Customer
shop.customers.empty_hint: Customers will appear here after their first order.
shop.customers.detail.title: Customer
shop.payments.hint: All payment transactions with method and status.
shop.payments.search_placeholder: Search by txn, order or customer…
shop.payments.error.not_refundable: Only captured payments can be refunded.
shop.payments.refund_confirm.title: Refund this payment?
shop.payments.refund_confirm.description: {amount} will be returned to the customer.
shop.payments.empty_hint: Transactions will appear here after checkout.
shop.invoices.hint: Issued invoices with due date and status.
shop.invoices.empty_hint: Invoices will appear here once issued.
shop.invoices.detail.title: Invoice
